title: Page-Level Storage & Fill Factors
description: Deconstruct the structure of database pages and their impact on disk I/O performance. Optimize storage efficiency and retrieval speed by managing row-ordering, data alignment, and fill factors within database pages.
objectives: Deconstruct the structure of database pages and their impact on disk I/O performance.
Optimize storage efficiency and retrieval speed by managing row-ordering, data alignment, and fill factors within database pages.
